mapper.select: select * from sys_user where username = #{username} and del_flag = '0'

select * from sys_user where del_flag = '0' and id in (select user_id from sys_user_role where role_id=#{roleId})
and username = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET org_code = #{orgCode} where username = #{username}
mapper.select: select * from sys_user where phone = #{phone} and del_flag = '0'
select * from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0'
SELECT username, realname FROM sys_user where id in (SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role where role_id in (SELECT id FROM sys_role WHERE role_name = '岗亭' or role_name = '管理员'))

SELECT username, realname FROM sys_user where del_flag = '0' and id in (SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role where role_id in (SELECT id FROM sys_role WHERE role_name = '岗亭' or role_name = '管理员')) and username not in (select operation_name from park_work_station where operation_name is not null and operation_name != '' and status = 1)
